title: File:Norwegian Prima entering Kiel LXXXV.jpg
description: Norwegian Prima entering Kiel for the first time, September 5 2022 — a wide context shot showing the ship's bow alongside the historic German Naval Yards crane (Howaldtswerke-Deutsche Werft / Krupp Kiel), giving a sense of the ship's scale against industrial maritime architecture.

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by Claude (operator-supervised), 2026-05-27
visual_verification.note: Wide harbor shot with Norwegian Prima's bow visible at center-right against the historic blue 'German Naval Yards' crane at left. Signature swirling hull livery visible at the bow. Overcast Kiel water and sky. Identity is unambiguous (livery confirms).
